summary: Comprehensive verification of Central Inventory app fixes. All 9 features tested and verified working correctly. Operations Hub progressive loading, Pending Queues with Reject/Approve buttons, Transfer Detail with FROM/TO labels and requester snapshot all functioning as expected.

tests.details: Loads within 5s showing greeting ('Good afternoon, Central'), KPI cards (Stale Approvals=3, Ready to Dispatch=1, Pending Receives=0, Low Stock Items=67), 'Loading intelligence data...' indicator visible during load. After ~15s shows full data with Store Health Grid (6 stores: DemoFranchise1-4, TestFranchise_P23_Central, TestFranchise_P23_Probe) and Quick Actions (Dispatch Stock, Add Stock, Adjust Stock, Record Wastage, Wastage Report).

Shows 3 approval cards with PO numbers (PO-0074, PO-0075, PO-0113), store names (My Genie → DemoFranchise4, My Genie → DemoCentral1), item tables with YOUR STOCK / AFTER APPROVAL columns. All buttons present: Reject (red), View Details, Approve All. 'Can fulfill' badges and age badges (6 days ago, 5 days ago) visible.

/transfer/74 shows PO-0074 with status timeline (Requested → Approved → Dispatched → Received). FROM card shows 'My Genie' [Central Store] with '(SOURCE — YOU)' label. TO card shows 'DemoFranchise4' [Outlet] with '(REQUESTER)' label.

REQUESTER STORE SNAPSHOT — DEMOFRANCHISE4 section visible with 4 stat cards (0 Out of Stock, 0 Low Stock, 4 Adequate, 4 Total Items). Item table shows Cooking Oil, maida, patri, red meat with Stock Level, Min Threshold, Status (OK badges), and 'In This Request?' column (patri shows 'Yes — 0.1 kg').

APPROVAL IMPACT ON YOUR STOCK section shows table with columns: Item, Requested, Your Stock, After Approval. patri row: 0.1 kg requested, 64.83 kg your stock, 64.73 kg after approval. Amber warning: 'Approving will reduce your stock as shown above'.

Master Stores tab shows 3 stores (DemoCentral1, DemoCentral2, TestCentral_P23_Probe) with columns: STORE, SENT, RECEIVED, TXNS, OUT OF STOCK, LOW STOCK, ADEQUATE. Health data visible (OUT OF STOCK: 182/182/164, LOW STOCK: 1/0/0, ADEQUATE: 1/2/0).

Shows 20+ transfer history rows with restaurant names (My Genie, DemoFranchise1-4, DemoCentral1-2). Columns: PO/Ref, Date, Source, Destination, Status, Type, Items, Direction, Updated. Status badges (Dispatched, Received, Requested, Withdrawn) and type badges (Direct Dispatch, Request) visible.

Shows 164 Total Items, 67 Low Stock Items, 8 Categories. Item list with columns: Ingredient, Category, Quantity, Min Alert, Status, Expiry Risk, Pending, Days of Cover. Low stock items highlighted with 'Low' badges.
Shows 164 ingredients with columns: Name, Category, Quantity, Min Alert, Status, Recipes, Vendor, Actions. OK/Low status badges visible. Search functionality and Add Item button present.
/dispatch/new loads with Destination Store selector, Items section with 'Select item' dropdown, Quantity and Unit fields, 'Add Item' button, and 'Create Dispatch' button.

All 13 sidebar links work: Operations Hub, Stock Inventory, Hierarchy Summary, Store Management, Pending Queues, History & Ledger, Consumption Report, Vendors, Ingredients, Products, Recipes, Addon Recipes, Settings.

issues: API responses take 10-15 seconds due to N+1 calls to external POS API - this is expected and documented

critical_code_review_comments: OperationsHub.jsx: Progressive loading working correctly - shows 'Loading intelligence data...' indicator while fetching, KPI cards render immediately with 0 values, Store Health Grid populates after batch API calls complete

PendingQueues.jsx: Approval cards correctly show Reject (red), View Details, Approve All buttons. YOUR STOCK / AFTER APPROVAL columns in item tables working. Insufficient stock warnings data-testid present but no warnings shown (all items can be fulfilled)

TransferDetail.jsx: FROM/TO labels correctly show '(Source — You)' and '(Requester)' based on current user context. Requester Store Snapshot section loads with stat cards and item table with OK/OUT/LOW badges. Approval Impact table shows stock reduction calculations
seed_data_creation: None - used existing POS API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Sprint fixes verified. Key test artifacts: (1) /transfer/74 for Transfer Detail with FROM/TO labels + requester snapshot + approval impact. (2) /queues for Pending Queues with 3 approval cards showing Reject/Approve All buttons. (3) Operations Hub shows progressive loading with 'Loading intelligence data...' indicator. (4) All 13 sidebar navigation links functional. Note: API responses are slow (10-15s) due to external POS API - use longer timeouts.
